metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop advanced textile techniques encompassing weaving, knitting, dyeing, and surface design. This course emphasizes both traditional and contemporary fiber arts, industry design practices, and portfolio development for aspiring textile professionals.
metadata.general_description: Advanced textile techniques including weaving, knitting, dyeing, surface design, and portfolio development.

big_ideas.statement: Textile arts integrate fiber, structure, color, and design to create functional and expressive works
big_ideas.elaboration: Textiles combine technical skill with creative expression through diverse techniques and material choices.

big_ideas.statement: Traditional textile techniques connect to cultural heritage and contemporary artistic practice
big_ideas.elaboration: Weaving, knitting, and dyeing represent both cultural traditions and contemporary design innovation.

big_ideas.statement: Textile design demands understanding of materials, color theory, structure, and functional requirements
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful textile design balances aesthetic vision with practical considerations of durability, use, and production.

big_ideas.statement: Portfolio development and professional practice prepare textile artists for careers in design and crafts
big_ideas.elaboration: Building a strong portfolio, developing skills, and understanding industry practices enable career success in textiles.

competencies.raw: Design textile concepts and original patterns
i_can_statements: I can create original pattern designs
I can apply design principles to textile work
I can develop color palettes for textile projects
I can design repeats and compositions

competencies.raw: Design textile structures and techniques for specific purposes
i_can_statements: I can design weave structures and patterns
I can plan knitting patterns and construction
I can design surface decoration approaches
I can match techniques to intended outcomes

competencies.raw: Design surface treatments and finishing approaches
i_can_statements: I can design dyeing and color application methods
I can plan embellishment and embroidery
I can design print and discharge techniques
I can create finishing strategies

competencies.raw: Design textile projects and collections for portfolio presentation
i_can_statements: I can conceptualize cohesive textile collections
I can design projects demonstrating range of skills
I can plan ambitious technical challenges
I can create series exploring themes or concepts

competencies.raw: Apply weaving techniques and loom skills with proficiency
i_can_statements: I can prepare yarn and set up looms
I can execute various weaving techniques
I can create both simple and complex patterns
I can troubleshoot weaving problems

competencies.raw: Apply knitting and fiber joining techniques
i_can_statements: I can execute hand and machine knitting
I can read and modify knitting patterns
I can create garments and three-dimensional forms
I can finish and join knitted pieces
I can dye fibers using various methods
I can apply color to finished textiles
I can achieve color consistency and control
I can work safely with dyes and chemicals

competencies.raw: Apply surface design and embellishment techniques
i_can_statements: I can design and execute printed patterns
I can apply embroidery and stitched embellishment
I can use discharge and resist techniques
I can combine multiple surface techniques

competencies.raw: Use textile equipment and machinery effectively
i_can_statements: I can operate various looms and textile equipment
I can maintain and troubleshoot machinery
I can use digital textile design software
I can evaluate and adapt to emerging technologies

competencies.raw: Use digital design tools for textile creation
i_can_statements: I can use pattern design software
I can create digital textile designs
I can simulate weaves and structures
I can prepare designs for production

competencies.raw: Use technology for color management and documentation
i_can_statements: I can document color and technical information
I can manage color specifications
I can photograph textile work professionally
I can create digital records of techniques

competencies.raw: Use technology for portfolio development and professional presentation
i_can_statements: I can create digital portfolio of textile work
I can photograph and edit textile images
I can build professional online presence
I can use social media for textile marketing
